Trigger map pending your sign-off. Nothing here is wired to app events yet. Each button = one motion + its proposed production trigger (Guide §7b). The wrong/correct reaction ladder is NOT in this package — blocked on the guided-solve file.
Reaction ladder — REBUILT (canonical upon Venkat approval)
streak: 0
Live wiring: the state bar drives Robo. 2 Wrong → concern · 5 Correct → ladder (press it again and again to climb the streak) · 2 then 5 → comeback · walkthrough states → total silence · and drag Robo anywhere with your finger.
Also try: poke him repeatedly (he escalates: wobble → giggle → spin+tongue → plays dead, then cools down) · drag him (he flails, dusts off on landing) · leave him alone ~22s (secret mischief; never while stuck) · open in a fresh tab (sneak-peek entrance, once per session).
